title: Skyblock Fusions
body:
A resourcepack meant for Hypixel Skyblock where old Furfsky Reborn (https://furfsky.net/) textures are fused together.

The 1.8.9 version of this resourcepack **requires** Optifine! For the skull textures to function **(optional, this won't affect item textures)** you will also need the NEU mod ([Not Enough Updates](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughupdates))

**All of the awesome textures we used were created by the Furfsky Reborn team, we simply remixed and combined them with permission.** I highly suggest checking out the original pack, a lot of time and effort was put into it by talented artists! It is one of the best Skyblock packs out there and one I've personally used for years!

If you want the latest leaks and fasted access to new releases or perhaps wanna submit suggestions, then be sure to join our [Discord server!](https://discord.gg/KqHaj4XFj3)
